name: Aberdeen Group Litigation Support Experience Summary (c.1998)
description: A circa-1998 summary of Aberdeen Group's litigation support experience, focusing on Peter S. Kastner's expert involvement in four legal cases: Computer Consoles vs. GTE Government Systems (RISC-Unix performance), GTE Products v. American Software (AS/400/SNA breach of contract), Unisys vs. Florida HRS (distributed IBM mainframe design), and Crossroads Software vs. Open Systems Advisors (trademark infringement). Includes case outcomes where known.
